sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49740" key="i)a=ton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰᾶτον</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n49740.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drink prepared from honey, wine and violets</tr_>, [<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> </bibl>] <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:5:33:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.33.6</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.16</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔλαιον ἰ</foreign>. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:118" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.118</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
